title: Birmingham Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Birmingham, with a Z-Score of -3.06. This event has a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Birmingham are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, with a high level of humidity at 75%. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 13.0 km/h, which may exacerbate the cold temperatures. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 11.7 GG, indicating a high demand for heating energy, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating no need for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
